name: Manila Round Hammered Drum Coffee Table - Threshold™
description:
Bring modern flair to your home with this Manila Hammered Barrel Coffee Table from Threshold™. In a hammered finish, this coffee table has an elegant rounded shape with beautiful texture, along with shiny and matte finishes to suit your own personal style. Whether you're using it to display decorative accents as a stylish spot in front of your sofa or adding a serving tray to enjoy drinks and snacks, you're sure to love the unique style and texture this piece adds to your living space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
